name: io.github.rod-anami-kyndryl/bmc-helix-mcp
description: A MCP Server for BMC Helix ITSM API.

environmentVariables.name: HELIX_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: BMC Helix Entry level REST API URL endpoint.

environmentVariables.name: HELIX_TOKEN_URL
environmentVariables.description: BMC Helix JWT Login endpoint URL.

environmentVariables.name: HELIX_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the retrieved BMC Helix TLS certificate chain.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port number on which the MCP Server should run.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional Bearer token to secure the MCP Server communication.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TLS_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to run the MCP Server with secure TLS (HTTPS).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TLS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Path to the TLS private key file.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TLS_CERT
environmentVariables.description: Path to the TLS certificate file.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TLS_CA
environmentVariables.description: Path to the TLS Certificate Authority (CA) file.
